title: Bishop Street Underwriters Announces Strategic Investment by White Mountains
author: Na
description: Bishop Street Underwriters, a RedBird Capital Partners portfolio company, announced a $125 million strategic capital investment from White Mountains Insurance Group. The investment comes after Bishop Street surpassed $650 million in gross written premium in 2025 with strong organic growth. White Mountains will serve as a strategic growth partner to help accelerate Bishop Street's expansion and global footprint in the MGA (Managing General Agents) sector.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strategic investment in high-growth MGA platform demonstrates confidence in Bishop Street's business model and market opportunity. Investment positions White Mountains to capitalize on secular growth tailwinds in the insurance distribution sector.

title: Congress Beat the Market Again—Here Are the 3 Stocks They Bought
author: Chris Markoch
description: Three stocks purchased by Congressional members showed market gains in November, including LCI Industries, LGI Homes, and White Mountains Insurance Group, despite broader market sell-offs.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock up 24.2% after beating earnings, with positive RV industry sales forecast through 2026
Stock up over 28% with analyst price target suggesting 36% potential gain, indicating potential housing market recovery
Stock up 10.6% supported by strong earnings report and self-tender offer, but with limited growth potential

title: White Mountains Sells Majority Stake In Bamboo In $1.75 Billion Deal
author: Triveni Kothapalli
description: White Mountains Insurance Group announced selling a controlling stake in Bamboo, its homeowners' insurance technology platform, to CVC Capital Partners for $1.75 billion. The deal is expected to add $310 to book value per share and generate $840 million in net cash proceeds.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is generating significant cash proceeds, improving book value, and retaining a 15% equity stake in a growing technology platform

title: White Mountains (WTM) Q2 Revenue Up 74%
author: Jesterai
description: White Mountains Insurance Group reported mixed Q2 2025 results with revenue growth of 74.4% but earnings per share missing analyst estimates. The company experienced significant premium growth in some segments while facing challenges from catastrophe losses.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mixed financial performance with strong revenue growth (+74.4%) but lower-than-expected earnings, offset by solid operating results in segments like Ark and Bamboo
Contributed positive mark-to-market gains with climbing share price

title: Nasdaq Sell-Off: 5 Unstoppable Stocks to Buy That Can Protect Your Principal and Grow Your Wealth in an Unpredictable Market
author: The Motley Fool
description: The article recommends 5 stocks that can protect investors' principal and grow their wealth during the Nasdaq sell-off: AT&T, AutoZone, NextEra Energy, White Mountains Insurance Group, and Johnson & Johnson.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights AT&T's strong operating performance, improved balance sheet, and ability to provide a basic necessity service, making it well-positioned to succeed in the current economic climate.
